title: Yan Diomande to Liverpool looks on: Fabrizio Romano drops bombshell news
description: Liverpool appear to have just moved closer to sign Yan Diomande. That comes after a bombshell Fabrizio Romano update.It's no secret that Liverpool want to sign Yan Diomande. The Mail is among those re...
content: Yan Diomande to Liverpool looks on: Fabrizio Romano drops bombshell newsLiverpool appear to have just moved closer to sign Yan Diomande. That comes after a bombshell Fabrizio Romano update.It's no secret that Liverpool want to sign Yan Diomande. The Mail is among those reporting that a €100m bid went in for the player, though it was rejected by RB Leipzig.One suggestion for that rejection is that Leipzig hope Paris Saint-Germain, the other great rival for Diomande, enter the race with an offer. Doing so would naturally drive the price higher.However, it now appears that won't happen. Fabrizio Romano reports that PSG now lead the race for Maghnes Akliouche from AS Monaco and that bids should go in shortly.Bet £10, Get £30 in Free BetsOpen an account and place a qualifying bet of £10 at min odds of 1/5 (1.2) or greater.18+New UK/ROI customers. Min £5 deposit. Bet Credits available on settlement of qualifying bets, capped at £10 stake. Min odds 1/5 (1.20). Bet Credits expire in 7 days. Excl. Cashed Out/Free Bets/Boosted odds. T&Cs apply. GambleAware.org£30 FREECLAIM NOW18+Gambling can be addictive — please only bet what you can afford to lose. For free support visitBeGambleAware.org or call 0808 8020 133 (free, 24/7). Self-exclude at GAMSTOP.co.uk. AnfieldWatch is not a licensed betting operator. Offers subject to change.This would be massive for Liverpool as Akliouche is another right-winger and it's incredibly unlikely that PSG would sign him and move for Diomande. In fact, we can't imagine Diomande would even choose to go to a club that just bought a talented young player in his position.It's a major advantage for Liverpool, then, and a major blow for Leipzig, who almost certainly won't get their wish of a bidding war. We find it difficult to believe that they'd reject another offer in the €100m range if they know it's all they can get, quite honestly.So this might really be it. This could be the news that Liverpool were waiting for - the revelation that it's now a one-horse race for Diomande and they simply need to get Leipzig to accept that.It would be one of the biggest signings in Liverpool's history, not just financially but in profile. There's no question that Diomande is one of the biggest talents in world football and someone that every club in the game would want.if he truly does end up at Anfield, the Reds can consider it one hell of a coup.

title: Gordon and Desir win 100m at Welsh Athletics Championships
description: Sam Gordon and Nell Desir won gold in the Welsh Athletics Championships in Leckwith, Cardiff.  Gordon, 31, ran a time of 10.40 seconds, finishing as the top Welsh runnner.  "It's nice when they get to come down and see me do what I love" Gordon said after winning gold.
content: Sam Gordon ran a time of 10.40 seconds to win gold. [Getty Images]Sam Gordon and Nell Desir won gold in the Welsh Athletics Championships in Leckwith, Cardiff. Gordon, 31, ran a time of 10.40 seconds, finishing as the top Welsh runnner."It feels really good, I can't lie." said Gordon."My wife, my son and my in-laws were there, they're the reason I do it."It's nice when they get to come down and see me do what I love" Gordon said after winning gold.18-year-old Nell Desir won gold in the women's 100m running a time of 11.53 seconds.Desir was only 0.15 seconds from her season's best.Poppy Elton won gold in the women's 1500m with a time of 4 minutes 24 seconds, six seconds ahead of second placed Lilly Grace Oakenfull, while Craig Williams took gold in the men's event with all three medalists finishing within two seconds of each other.Ruby Jerges won the women's long jump, with a jump of 6.22m, in a field that included team Wales Commonwealth Games para-athlete Olivia Breen, who jumped a 4.97m less than a month out from the start of the games in Glasgow.Cornwall based Patrick Swan continued his impressive week winning gold in the men's shot put throwing 17.79m. This comes only a week after winning Bronze at the UK Athletics Championships in Birmingham."It feels really good doing a good performance for my home country" said Swan."I know I was born in England, but I feel like a patriotic Welshman at heart."Osian Parry was the fastest finishing Welshman in the 400m hurdles, running a 52.64, while Sophie Lisk, who finished eighth at the UK Champs, won in the woman's event with a time of one minute and one second."Last year I finished second, so I was really driven to win gold today, so I'm happy" Lisk said."I kind of wanted a personal best here today, but trying to recover from back to back races this week has been tough."Team Wales named for Glasgow Commonwealth GamesTeam Wales hopefuls in search of Commonwealth goldBrier calls for change after Games heartache

title: திருச்சானூா் தெப்போற்சவம்: பத்மாவதி தாயாா் வலம்
UFC Baku live blog: Rafael Fiziev vs. Manuel Torres
description: Play-by-play action for Rafael Fiziev vs. Manuel Torres at UFC Baku
content: BAKU, AZERBAIJAN - JUNE 26: (L-R) Opponents Rafael Fiziev of Kazakstan and Manuel Torres of Mexico face off during the UFC Fight Night ceremonial weigh-in at National Gymnastics Arena on June 26, 2026 in Baku, Azerbaijan. (Photo by Jeff Bottari/Zuffa LLC)	This is the live blog for Rafael Fiziev vs. Manuel Torres, the lightweight main event for Saturday’s UFC Baku card at National Gymnastics Arena in Baku, Azerbaijan.Fiziev is hanging on to a top 15 spot at 155 pounds in the MMA Fighting Global Rankings, while Torres looks to establish himself among the elite of one of MMA’s deepest divisions.Azerbaijan’s Fiziev (13-5) is mired in the worst stretch of his career, having suffered a knockout loss to Mauricio Ruffy this past February at UFC 325 that sent him to his fourth loss in five fights. Prior to this slump, Fiziev had won six straight fights and was well on his way to a title shot before dropping fights to Justin Gaethje, Ruffy, and Gamrot, the latter via a knee injury that took him out of action for a year and a half.Torres (17-3) is trending in the opposite direction, coming off of consecutive first-round knockouts of Grant Dawson and Drew Dober. Since being signed off of Dana White’s Contender Series in 2021, Torres has won five of his six UFC fights.Check out the Rafael Fiziev vs. Manuel Torres live blog below.PreambleAlright, let’s see how much Rafael Fiziev has left in the tank. Are his recent losses to elite competition a sign that he’s past it, or is he about to right the ship against Manuel Torres?Always tell me the oddsFanDuel odds have this dead even, with both fighters at -108. Too close to call.Round 1Referee Marc Goddard the third man in the cage for the main event.Fiziev out firing, he throws a body kick and connects with an overhand right. Torres punches his way off of the cage. Fiziev backs up staying just out of range. Fiziev changes levels and gets in on a takedown, driving Torres to the fence and putting him on his backside. Torres able to get up quickly, but he lands a knee to the groin and that briefly pauses the action. Fiziev good to go.Torres hunting with that jab, Fizeiv countering with outside leg kicks. Torres throwing the jab out with a ton of confidence. Fiziev having a hard time closing the distance now. Another good jab by Torres. Fiziev catches a kick and dumps Torres. He goes to the ground wanting to steal the round with damage from top position, Torres ties him up nicely and springs up. Fiziev with a counter left. Torres just misses on a high knee, but the follow-up punch connects. Close round.MMA Fighting scores the round 10-9, Torres.Round 2Whoa, wicked spin kick by Fiziev lands. Looks like it was partially blocked, but enough got through to wobble Torres. Fiziev pounces and swarms with punches. Torres is hurt, Fiziev on top throwing heavy follow-ups. Goddard has to step in, this one is over!Official result: Rafael Fiziev def. Manuel Torres via KO (spin kick, punches) (R2, 0:15)

title: Jalen Hurts could reach a new level in Sean Mannion’s offense
description: The Athletic's Ted Nguyen believes Sean Mannion is one of the NFL's most fascinating assistant coaches to watch this season.
content: The NFL has always been a copycat league. One coach finds success, and before long, the rest of the league is searching for the next version of the same idea. Once upon a time, there was 'The Wildcat Formation'. Don't mention that to too many older Philadelphia Eagles fans if you can help it. Failure to do so conjures up post-traumatic stress and potentially nightmares about Ronnie Brown.Every attempt to follow the leader in the NFL won't bring tragedy, though, or proclamations from Vince Young about a 'Dream Team. Sometimes, imitation unlocks new ways of thinking. Sometimes, trends are schematic. Other times, they're philosophical. More often than not, they begin with a coaching tree.Philadelphia is hoping that's exactly what happens with Sean Mannion. The Eagles' new offensive coordinator enters his first season calling plays after spending years learning from some of the brightest offensive minds in football. His résumé includes time with Matt LaFleur, whose own coaching roots trace back through Kyle Shanahan and Sean McVayThey are two of the main architects of two of the NFL's most innovative offenses. That's one reason The Athletic's Ted Nguyen recently identified Mannion as one of the league's most interesting new play callers entering the 2027 season. Nguyen, speaking on “The Rich Eisen Show” with guest host Kirk Morrison, said Mannion’s fit with Hurts will be one of the NFL’s most interesting storylines.“I think Sean Mannion is going to be one of the most interesting new play callers to watch because he’s going to the Eagles team with a ton of talent. He’s going to ask Jalen Hurts to do things that he really hasn’t done in the past. I think he’s going to ask him to throw over the middle a little bit more, play under center more, and that’s going to be one of the most interesting storylines in the league — how he adapts to Mannion’s offense and what kind of offensive coordinator Mannion is going to be in his first year.”Sean Mannion brings a respected offensive pedigree to PhiladelphiaMannion's journey has been eventful. Before becoming a coach, he spent nearly a decade in the NFL as a quarterback. That gave him the unique perspective of learning multiple offensive systems from inside the huddle. That experience later carried over into coaching, where he continued developing under LaFleur's guidance. The Shanahan-McVay coaching tree has influenced offensive football across the league for nearly a decade. Motion, play-action, misdirection, and creative personnel usage have become staples for teams searching to manufacture explosive plays. The Eagles are betting Mannion can bring some of those same concepts to Philadelphia while tailoring the offense to Jalen Hurts' strengths.Expectations for the Eagles are understandably highEagles fans have spent years admiring the creativity displayed by offenses in places like Los Angeles, Green Bay, Miami, and San Francisco. Now, Philadelphia has an opportunity to develop its own version. That doesn't mean Mannion will simply copy what his mentors have done. Every successful play caller eventually develops his own identity. Still, it's easy to understand why Nguyen believes Mannion deserves close attention. If the Eagles' offense takes another step forward this season, Mannion's first year as a play caller could become one of the NFL's most compelling coaching stories. For now, optimism remains just that, optimism. Still, between his background, his coaching influences, and the talent already in place on Philadelphia's roster, it's easy to understand why so many people around the league are eager to see what Sean Mannion creates with elite offensive talent. This article originally appeared on Eagles Wire: Jalen Hurts could reach a new level in Sean Mannion’s offense

title: UFC Baku live results, highlights and play-by-play
description: UFC Baku results, highlights, live discussion and instant play-by-play, reactions and analysis.
content: SYDNEY, AUSTRALIA - FEBRUARY 01: Rafael Fiziev of Kazakstan prepares to face Mauricio Ruffy of Brazil in a lightweight fight during the UFC 325 event at Qudos Bank Arena on February 01, 2026 in Sydney, Australia. (Photo by Jeff Bottari/Zuffa LLC)	Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) is live TODAY (Sat., June 27, 2026)with UFC Baku, streaming live online via Paramount+. The event happens inside Baku Crystal Hall in Baku, Azerbaijan.UFC Baku PreviewUFC is back out on the road this week for its second trip to the Azerbaijan capital of Baku (and its second juicy site fee from that small nation). The fight card is tailored specifically for their patrons, as you’d expect.UFC Baku’s main event is Rafael Fiziev vs. Manuel Torres. Fiziev was born in Kazakhstan, moved to Kyrgyzstan and now trains in Thailand (and Florida). Though, he proudly carries the flag of Azerbaijan and is much beloved in Baku. Torres, meanwhile, travels to Eurasia from Mexico, looking to add Fiziev’s name to his impressive list of first round knockout victims.The co-main is a funky match-up between Michel Pereira vs. Shara Magomedov. These two have lots of highlights to their names. They also have a few head-scratching moments, too. Both are coming off wins here, but both also need to do a lot more to become factors in the Middleweight division.Rounding out the main card is Nazim Sadykhov vs. Matheus Camilo, Asu Almabayev vs. Charles Johnson, Brunno Ferreira vs. Ikram Aliskerov and Abus Magomedov vs. Michal Oleksiejczuk.The “Prelims” are headlined by Farman Hasanov vs. Eric Nolan. The “Prelims” are also home to top prospect Abdul Rakhman Yakhyaev. He fights Julius Walker. Nursulton Ruziboev vs. Andrey Pulyaev should also be a good scrap on the undercard.UFC Baku Start Date and TimeWe’re operating at primetime over in Azerbaijan. That means we have a special start time this weekend. Checkout the Paramount+ timings inside Baku Crystal Hall below:UFC Baku’s “Prelims” will begin at 9 a.m. ET.UFC Baku’s main card is scheduled to start at 12 p.m. ET.All of UFC Baku airs on Paramount+, which you can stream here.The live blog here starts rolling below at 9 a.m. ET. Come in and say hi!UFC BAKU QUICK RESULTSMain card155 lbs.: Rafael Fiziev def. Manuel Torres by KO (spinning wheel kick and punches), round 2 (0:15)185 lbs.: Shara Magomedov def. Michel Pereira by unanimous decision (29-28, 29-28, 29-28)155 lbs.: Matheus Camilo def. Nazim Sadykhov by TKO (punches), round 1 (1:31) — HIGHLIGHTS125 lbs.: Asu Almabayev def. Charles Johnson by submission (Suloev’s stretch), round 3 (3:33) — HIGHLIGHTS185 lbs.: Ikram Aliskerov def. Brunno Ferreira by unanimous decision (30-27, 30-27, 30-27)185 lbs.: Abus Magomedov def. Michal Oleksiejczuk by submission (guillotine), round 1 (3:25) — HIGHLIGHTSPrelims155 lbs.: Farman Hasanov def. Eric Nolan by unanimous decision (30-27, 30-27, 30-27)205 lbs.: Abdul-Rakhman Yakhyaev def. Julius Walker by TKO (punches), round 1 (0:08) — HIGHLIGHTS185 lbs.: Nursulton Ruziboev def. Andrey Pulyaev by technical submission (rear naked choke), round 1 (3:58) — HIGHLIGHTS145 lbs.: Kaan Ofli def. Javier Reyes by submission (arm triangle), round 1 (4:16)170 lbs.: Daniil Donchenko def. Theodor Berggren by TKO (head kick and punches), round 2 (1:35) — HIGHLIGHTS135 lbs.: Jean Matsumoto def. Bekzat Almakhan by unanimous decision (29-28, 29-28, 29-28)170 lbs.: Tahir Abdullayev def. Jefferson Nascimento by TKO (ground and pound), round 3 (4:28) — HIGHLIGHTSUFC BAKU PLAY-BY-PLAY UPDATESMain CardRafael Fiziev vs. Manuel TorresRound 1: Fiziev came out swinging. He landed a leg kick and then a stiff jab. It didn’t take long for Torres to fire back, though, with a one two. Fiziev then got in tight and managed to get Torres down against the fence. Torres got up quickly, though, and then landed a knee below the belt. After the restart Fiziev scored with some good leg kicks. Torres responded with hard jabs, though. Fiziev then caught a high kick attempt and landed his second takedown of the fight. Torres wasn’t down long, though, and he landed another power jab at the end of the round. It’s a very tough roiund to score, but I think Torres shaded it on damage (thanks to those jabs).10-9 TorresRound 2: Fiziev dropped Torres early with a spinning kick right at the start of the round. Torres was shocked by that. Fiziev didn’t give him time to react, though, he launched himself on top of him and landed a handful of ground shots that forced the stoppage. Wow.Straight to work 💪@RafaelFiziev vs Manuel Torres[ #UFCBaku | LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/sx4TWYezEF— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Rafael Fiziev def. Manuel Torres by KO (spinning wheel kick and punches), round 2 (0:15)Shara Magomedov vs. Michel PereiraRound 1: Pereira drops Magomedov with a straight right. Pereira stands over him and lands some shots. That bloodies Magomedov off. Magomedov throws upkicks to give him some space and time to recover. Pereira takes his time before throwing the legs to the side and dropping down onto Magomedov. The action gets paused as Magomedov gets warned about holding onto Pereira’s pony tail. After the restart Pereira finds some nice rhythm with his ground and pound. Pereira tries to take the back, but slips off and ends up on bottom with 30 seconds left.A HUGE RIGHT HAND 🤯[ @UFCPereira | #UFCBaku | LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/GXfieJxPl6— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 202610-9 PereiraRound 2: Magomedov starts the round with some good kicks, including some teeps to the knee. Magomedov then landed some nice side kicks to the body. All the while, Pereira sat back looking for a big shot. This lead to there not being much action in the round and that gave Magomedov the chance to even the score.19-19Round 3: The cautious approach from both men leaked into the third round as well. Pereira might have been tired. He continued to sit back and just look for a perfect single shot. Half way through the round he abandoned that and went for a takedown, which Magomedov stuffed. Pereira caught a finger in the eye in the process. After the restart there were some fun exchanges, with both men knowing they needed to win. Pereira dived for a takedown and Magomedov tried to catch him with a flying knee. Neither man connected and it resulted in Pereira pressing Magomedov to the fence. Magomedov landed a good knee to the body on the break. He then chased down Pereira and tried to have a Max Holloway moment in the middle, but it just didn’t happen. Magomedov’s activity and more obvious desire gives him the round, and fight, for me.29-28 MagomedovOfficial decision: Shara Magomedov def. Michel Pereira by unanimous decision (29-28, 29-28, 29-28)Nazim Sadykhov vs. Matheus CamiloRound 1: Sadykhov looked very smooth early on, but he walked right into a Camilo straight right hand. He went down quickly and covered up. Camilo jumped on and the referee waved it off. Sadykhov popped up immediately and complained. It felt like an OK stoppage, though. That silenced the crowd, who may have been their loudest tonight when Sadykhov walked out.MAKING A STATEMENT 😤@MatheusCamiloM ends it early in RD1![ #UFCBaku |  LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/w80wAVERpF— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Matheus Camilo def. Nazim Sadykhov by TKO (punches), round 1 (1:31)Asu Amabayev vs. Charles JohnsonRound 1: Almabayev came out looking like he wanted to box. He landed a good shot and then switched to his wrestling game. He got Johnson down and then wouldn’t let him up. On top he landed a few shots and also threatened a guillotine.10-9 AlmabayevRound 2: Almabayev was really feeling himself in this round. His striking looks great as he landed big shots on Johnson. Johnson tried to stay mobile, but Almabayev was catching up to him and either landing an overhand or pulling him down for a takedown. Johnson landed a nice combo, but Almabayev took that as a reason to switch to wrestling, with a great double leg in the middle of the cage. Johnson worked hard on the bottom, but Almabayev was too good for him.😮‍💨😮‍💨😮‍💨[ Asu Almabayev | #UFCBaku | LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/Z32IOxXQrw— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 202620-18 AlmabayevRound 3: Johnson came out throwing kicks (against his corner’s advice). He was then taken down off one of them. Johnson landed with a reverse triangle like position, but Almabayev was able to get out, get on top, and keep doing what he’s best at. Johnson kept moving looking for routes to get up, but Almabayev kept moving, too, and stayed on top of him. That movement opened up opportunity for the Suloev stretch — which Almabayev converted.A SUPURB SUBMISSION 🤩Asu Almabayev locks up the suloev stretch in RD3![ #UFCBaku | LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/jFdIsMe1ZL— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Asu Almabayev def. Charles Johnson by submission (Suloev’s stretch), round 3 (3:33)Brunno Ferreira vs. Ikram AliskerovRound1: Aliskerob led the dance in this round and Ferreira struggled to get past his big reach. Aliskerov’s best shot was a jump knee, which he used to then transition to a takedown. He held Ferreira down for some time, but didn’t do much damage. Still, the round was his.The flying knee CONNECTS 🎯[ @Ikram_Aliskerov | #UFCBaku | LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/J3OqPxCvDL— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 202610-9 AlikskerovRound 2: Aliskerov continued to have the better success on the feet, stinging Ferreira with his long punches and landing another nice knee. Aliskerov was also able to use his strikes to set up another takedown. Again, he enjoyed lots of time on top, but didn’t do much damage. Ferreira threatened with submissions from the bottom, including a calf slicer, but that wasn’t enough to take the round.20-18 AliskerovRound 3: Ferreira landed some good early offense on the tired Aliskerov. But Aliskerov wasn’t too tired to land a takedown. Once he got that, Ferreira looked a little demoralized and he wasn’t able to do much with Aliskerov on his back, in a body triangle, landing punches to the side of his head.30-27 AliskerovOfficial decision: Ikram Aliskerov def. Brunno Ferreira by unanimous decision (30-27, 30-27, 30-27)Abus Magomedov vs. Michal OleksiejzcukRound 1: There was a lot of pawing and pacing to start this bout with Oleksiejczuk trying to walk down Magomedov. Magomedov landed a big knee in the clinch. After that, while separated, Oleksiejczuk walked into a huge elbow strike. That put him down to a knee. Magomedov then swarmed on him and latched on a iron-clad guillotine that put Oleksiejczuk to sleep. Bit of a late release there from Magomedov.The sequence that started it all 👏@OfficialAbus earns the big win at #UFCBaku![ LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/MFXgzYpalw— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Abus Magomedov def. Michal Oleksiejczuk by submission (guillotine), round 1 (3:25)PrelimsFarman Hasanov vs. Eric Nolan: Hasanov’s smothering and relentless wrestling game got him the win here. He took Nolan down nine times in the first round. He was awfully gassed in the second, but Nolan wasn’t very fresh either. That allowed Hasanov to stay out of danger and then muscle through a few more big takedowns on route to the lopsided victory.Official decision: Farman Hasanov def. Eric Nolan by unanimous decision (30-27, 30-27, 30-27)Abdul-Rakhman Yakhyaev vs. Julius Walker: The legend of Yakhyaev grows. He drops Walker with the first punch his threw for the sub-ten second TKO win. This man needs a bigger challenge.OH. MY. GOODNESS.@YakhyaevMMA needed less than 10 seconds for the finish![ #UFCBaku |  LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/HNDhaKfkpH— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Abdul-Rakhman Yakhyaev def. Julius Walker by TKO (punches), round 1 (0:08)Nursulton Ruziboev vs. Andrey Pulyaev: Ruziboev didn’t waste much time here. He got an early take down and quickly took the back. He focused on the rear naked choke and, after a few adjustments, was able to put Pulyaev to sleep!SUBMISSION SPECIALIST 🤩@Nursulton_MMA locks in submission #21 at #UFCBaku![ LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/ThiwCb5bak— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Nursulton Ruziboev def. Andrey Pulyaev by technical submission (rear naked choke), round 1 (3:58)Kaan Ofli vs. Javier Reyes: Ofli did well to disguise his reach disadvantage in this fight. He was able to get past Reyes’ longer arms and land the better shots in the exchanges. He eventually managed to drop Reyes with a short right hook. He then got on top, secured full mount and the got the arm triangle.3 straight for the Aussie 🇦🇺@KaanOfli earns ANOTHER submission victory at #UFCBaku![ LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/aZr5KKVDAr— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Kaan Ofli def. Javier Reyes by submission (arm triangle), round 1 (4:16)Daniil Donchenko vs. Theodor Berggren: Donchenko continued to look like a very exciting Welterweight prospect here. He flowed and spammed Berggren with punches in the manner we’re starting to get used to. It all proved too much for the Octagon newcomer. Donchenko hurt him a few times in the first two rounds, but then put him down with a huge head kick.SHIN TO CHIN 🤯@DonchenkoUFC gets the finish at #UFCBaku![ LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/3gMzUWRBxM— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Daniil Donchenko def. Theodor Berggren by TKO (head kick and punches), round 2 (1:35)Bekzat Almakhan vs. Jean Matsumoto: Almakhan showed off his power in the first round, dropping Matsumoto. Matsumoto recovered well, though, and took the second and third rounds thanks to his perfect timed takedowns (as well as some nice counter punching). He managed to stay in the fight despite a very nasty cut being opened up over his eye in the second round.1, 2 sits him down 😳[ Bekzat Almakhan | #UFCBaku | LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/Dajsf0nHN1— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Jean Matsumoto def. Bekzat Almakhan by unanimous decision (29-28, 29-28, 29-28)Tahir Abdullayev vs. Jefferson Nascimento: Nothing happened in the first round of this fight, much to the chagrin of the crowd and, to be fair, Abdullayev. In the second round Adullayev came forwards, but walked into big counter shots from Nascimento. In the third round, they actually started fighting. Adullayev got a takedown and landed some big ground and pound. After Abdullayev landed some big shots the referee stepped in with an absurd early stoppage for the hometown fighter.A debut win at home 🇦🇿Tahir Abdullayev earns the RD3 TKO victory![ #UFCBaku |  LIVE NOW on @ParamountPlus ] pic.twitter.com/Y71GogGzMy— UFC (@ufc) June 27, 2026Official decision: Tahir Abdullayev def. Jefferson Nascimento by TKO (ground and pound), round 3 (4:28)Live stream begins at 9 a.m. ET …For more UFC Baku: “Fiziev vs. Torres” news and notes be sure to hit up our comprehensive event archive right here.

title: Can Messi play Ronaldo in World Cup? Explaining knockout bracket for Argentina, Portugal
description: Here's what to know about Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo's potential World Cup meeting.
content:
Can Messi play Ronaldo in World Cup? Explaining knockout bracket for Argentina, Portugal originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.As the group stage comes to a close and the knockout bracket is taking shape, two of the biggest stars in the World Cup could be on a collision course.Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo are both playing in their record sixth World Cup in hopes of taking home the title. Messi is a defending champion after winning it all in 2022, while Ronaldo hasn't made it as far as the semifinals since his first appearance in 2006.With one day of games left in the group stage, there is still much to settle in Group K, as Portugal can finish one of several places in the standings. One specific scenario, though, would put Roberto Martinez's team on the same side of the bracket as Argentina.Here's what to know about Messi and Ronaldo's potential World Cup meeting.2026 WORLD CUP HQ:Latest World Cup news | Full World Cup schedule | Buy World Cup ticketsCan Messi play Ronaldo in World Cup?There is a scenario that would lead to a battle between Messi and Ronaldo early in the knockout stage.Argentina has already secured the top spot in Group J, meaning the team knows exactly where it will be placed in the knockout stage. It will face off against Cape Verde in the Round of 32.While Portugal is still fighting for seeding in the final day of group play, the team could find itself on Argentina's side of the bracket. If Portugal finishes in first place in Group K, it would mean that Argentina and Portugal could meet in the quarterfinals.However, if Portugal finishes in second place in Group K, then it will be placed on the complete opposite side of the bracket. This would mean that Messi and Ronaldo could only meet in the World Cup final.Finally, Portugal is still eligible to finish in third in its bracket if results don't go the team's way on Saturday. That scenario would put Portugal on the same side of the bracket as Argentina, with a chance to meet each other in the semifinals.Argentina knockout bracketArgentina clinched the top spot in Group J after just two victories in the group stage. As a result, the Albiceleste will now face Cape Verde in Round of 32, as African side secured second place in its group with three straight draws.If Argentina takes care of business against Cape Verde, it will face the winner of Egypt vs. Australia in the Round of 16. Both those teams finished in second place in their respective groups and would each be massive underdogs against the defending champions.Argentina's potential quarterfinal opponents are still up in the air as the rest of the group stage comes to a close, but one possible foe is Switzerland. However, that is the round where Messi and Ronaldo could meet, as Portugal winning Group K would put them on that side of the bracket.From there, Argentina could play a semifinal match against any one of several teams, including Mexico, Norway, Brazil, or the Ivory Coast. It is also notable that Argentina can only play France, Spain, Germany, or Morocco if they meet in the finals.LIVE:Updated World Cup knockout bracket as the group stage comes to a closePortugal knockout bracketPortugal's knockout path depends on how it closes the group stage on Saturday night, as it could still finish either in first or second in Group K.If Portugal wins its group, it will face one of several third-place finishers from the group stage. Those options include Ecuador, Senegal, Austria, Algeria, Ghana or Croatia, all of whom have either already finished in third place or could finish in third depending on Saturday's results.In that scenario, Portugal would be lined up to potentially face Switzerland in the Round of 16 before a collision course with Argentina in the quarterfinals.However, it's still possible Portugal finishes in second in its group. That finish would have the Selecao playing one of England, Ghana or Croatia in the Round of 32, depending on which of those three teams finishes in second place in Group L.Portugal's second-place knockout path would also have the team facing a potential match against Spain in the Round of 16, with USA or Belgium lurking in the quarterfinals.Finally, it's still possible that Portugal finishes in third place in Group K. That would mean the team plays the winner of Group L, either England, Ghana or Croatia, with a path to potentially face Mexico in the Round of 16.MORE WORLD CUP NEWS:Who will win the World Cup in 2026?Updated FIFA World RankingsHow World Cup qualifying worksExplaining the expanded World Cup bracketFull list of teams to qualify for 2026 World Cup

title: Apni Party Seeks Unemployment Allowance for Youth
description:
Holds workers’ convention in Lolab 
Srinagar, June 27:-  Senior Apni Party leader and former Cabinet Minister Ghulam Hassan Mir on Saturday accused the ruling National Conference (NC) government of failing to fulfil its election promises and demanded unemployment allowances for jobless youth if it was unable to provide employment.
Addressing a party workers' convention in Lolab, Kupwara, Mir said the government's assurances of creating one lakh jobs, regularising daily wagers, providing 200 units of free electricity, free LPG cylinders and enhancing ration quotas had remained unfulfilled. He alleged that the promises were made solely to secure votes and claimed the government had failed to deliver effective governance.
Criticising the government's outsourcing of jobs, Mir said it reflected a lack of commitment towards addressing unemployment. He urged the administration to introduce unemployment allowances for youth until adequate job opportunities are created.
Mir also dismissed the ruling party's proposed sit-in protest in Delhi to seek restoration of statehood as a "political gimmick" and rejected the government's contention that the absence of statehood was preventing it from fulfilling its promises. He said governance should not come to a standstill because of the constitutional status of the Union Territory.
Highlighting Kupwara's tourism potential, Mir called for the development of the district's scenic destinations to boost the local economy and generate employment.
Speaking on the occasion, Apni Party Provincial President Mohammad Ashraf Mir urged party workers to strengthen their outreach and remain connected with people at the grassroots. He asked workers to highlight the party's agenda and ensure that voters are not misled by what he described as the false promises of traditional political parties in the forthcoming Urban Local Bodies and Panchayat elections.
Several senior party leaders, including Chief Coordinator and Returning Officer Abdul Majeed Padder, also attended the convention.

title: NC dismisses Allegations Over Recruitment Process
description:
Government Committed to Transparent Governance: Showkat Mir
Srinagar, June 27:  Jammu and Kashmir National Conference (NC) Provincial President Kashmir, Showkat Ahmad Mir on Sunday said that despite operating under the limitations of a Union Territory and in the absence of restored statehood, the Omar Abdullah-led government has delivered “transparent, people-centric and accountable governance” over the past one and a half years.
Addressing a party meeting at the NC headquarters, Mir said the government is working to fulfil its election manifesto commitments while focusing on sustainable development, economic progress, social welfare and long-term stability in Jammu and Kashmir. The meeting also discussed organisational matters, public grievances, developmental works and upcoming party programmes.
Launching a sharp attack on the PDP, BJP and Peoples Conference, Mir rejected their allegations regarding recruitment processes, calling them politically motivated and baseless. He said these parties were “directionless” and attempting to mislead the public due to a lack of constructive agenda.
He alleged that during their respective tenures, these parties were responsible for irregularities and backdoor appointments in several institutions, including the Khadi and Village Industries Board, the Social Welfare Department and J&K Bank. He further claimed that political influence had played a role in recruitments under previous governments.
Reaffirming the government’s stance on transparency, Mir said Chief Minister Omar Abdullah has challenged the opposition to provide evidence of any backdoor appointment under the current administration. He asserted that the present government remains committed to clean, transparent and accountable governance.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi In, Tilak Varma Out: India Predicted Playing XI For 2nd T20I Vs Ireland
description: India prepare for the second T20I vs Ireland as they aim to bounce back from their loss. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi may debut, potentially replacing Tilak Varma.
content: India started their new T20I journey under the brand new captain Shreyas Iyer on a pretty sour note as they were handed a shock defeat by Ireland in the first match of the two-game series in Belfast on June 26 (Friday). India will next face Ireland in the second and final game of the series on June 28 (Sunday), as they desperately need a win to save the series. The question on everyone's mind is whether Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will get his debut in that game, and if he does get his India call-up, who he will replace in the lineup.Vaibhav Sooryavanshi In, Tilak Varma OutIndia needs some firepower at the top and someone who could compliment Abhishek Sharma to land double hammer blows to the Irish fast bowlers, who were so good in the first T20I. That is where Vaibhav Sooryavanshi comes in. This means that Sanju Samson has to come down the order at no.3, something that he can easily do given his experience. Shreyas Iyer can come in at no.4, while Ishan Kishan can drop down to no.5, a position he has batted successfully in Jharkhand's victorious campaign in the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2026. Shivam Dube and Axar Patel can come in at 6 and 7.This would mean that India have to drop their vice-captain Tilak Varma, who looked to struggle in his innings in the first T20I, where he could only manage to score 19 runs from 21 balls.Washington Sundar Out; Prince Yadav To DebutIndia should ideally drop Washington Sundar from the side in the second T20I vs Ireland. He scred just 9 runs in the bat, and bowled a single over where he was smashed for 19 runs. India should drop the idea of the extra all-rounder and go for a specialist spinner in Ravi Bishnoi. Harshit Rana has shown previously that he can hold himself with the bat, and hence he would be a good option for the no.8 spot.Prasidh Krishna had a horror show in the first T20I, giving away 57 runs from 4 overs. Instead of Krishna, India could go for Prince Yadav, who will be a handy option in what would be his T20I debut.India Predicted Playing XI For 2nd T20I Vs IrelandVaibhav Sooryavanshi, Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson (wk), Shreyas Iyer, Ishan Kishan, Shivam Dube, Axar Patel, Harshit Rana, Arshdeep Singh, Prince Yadav, Ravi BishnoiIndia Squad For T20I Series Vs IrelandShreyas Iyer (c), Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson, Ishan Kishan, Shivam Dube, Tilak Varma (vc), Suryansh Shegde, Axar Patel, Washington Sundar, Varun Chakravarthy, Ravi Bishnoi, Prasidh Krishna, Harshit Rana, Arshdeep Singh, Prince Yadav, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.

title: Watch Kings Of Leon headline first ever State Fayre Festival: “It feels like coming home”
description:
The Tennessee band opened the festival of music and barbecue in Chelmsford last night (June 26)
The post Watch Kings Of Leon headline first ever State Fayre Festival: “It feels like coming home” appeared first on NME.
content:
Kings Of Leon have kicked off the inaugural State Fayre festival with a hits-packed headline set – watch footage below.

READ MORE: Kings Of Leon – ‘Can We Please Have Fun’ review: a return to their rugged roots… sort of

The Tennessee band topped the bill on the opening night of the new festival at Hylands Park in Chelmsford last night (June 26), following sets from The Black Crowes, Stephen Wilson Jr, Kingfishr and more.
State Fayre, which bills itself as the UK’s biggest music and barbecue festival, is taking place across the weekend and combines a rock, Americana and country-leaning line-up with American-inspired food, decor and fairground attractions.
With the festival opening during a record-breaking UK heatwave, and the smell of barbecue drifting across the site as the band took to the Main Stage, frontman Caleb Followill told the crowd “it feels like being home”.
Kings Of Leon opened with ‘Find Me’ before moving into fan favourites including ‘The Bucket’, ‘Fans’, ‘On Call’, ‘Use Somebody’, ‘Waste A Moment’, ‘Closer’, ‘Molly’s Chambers’, ‘Black Thumbnail’ and ‘Sex On Fire’.
Check out footage from the set here:



Kings Of Leon at State Fayre Festival. CREDIT: Matt Eachus The Manc Photographer
Kings Of Leon at State Fayre Festival. CREDIT: JCrispinPhoto
Kings Of Leon at State Fayre Festival. CREDIT: Matt Eachus The Manc Photographer
Kings Of Leon played:
‘Find Me’
‘The Bucket’
‘Fans’
‘On Call’
‘Revelry’
‘Manhattan’
‘Use Somebody’
‘Waste A Moment’
‘Wait For Me’
‘Split Screen’
‘The Immortals’
‘Supersoaker’
‘Closer’
‘Molly’s Chambers’
‘Razz’
‘My Party’
‘Birthday’
‘Back Down South’
‘Radioactive’
‘Pyro’
‘Knocked Up’
‘Black Thumbnail’ 
‘Sex On Fire’ 
The festival continues today (June 27) with a headline set from Alanis Morissette, who replaced Neil Young earlier this year after he cancelled his planned UK and European tour dates with The Chrome Hearts.
Skunk Anansie are also set to appear today, while The Lumineers will close the festival tomorrow (June 28). Other artists across the weekend include Elvis Costello & The Imposters with Charlie Sexton and Counting Crows.
Kings Of Leon, meanwhile, will continue their UK and Ireland dates next week, including shows in Belfast, Limerick, Glasgow, Manchester and Leeds. Find any remaining tickets here.
Kings Of Leon will play:
JUNE 
29 – Belfast, Ormeau Park
JULY 
1 – Limerick, Thomond Park
3 – Glasgow, Bellahouston Park
4 – Manchester, Co-op Live
6 – Leeds, First Direct Bank Arena
10 – Madrid, Mad Cool Festival
The band last released an album with ‘Can We Please Have Fun’ in 2024. In a three-star review, NME described the record as “easily KOL’s most promising, liberated record for over a decade”, while adding that it was “still surprisingly restrained in places”.
Speaking to NME around the album’s release, the band said they had rediscovered their sense of excitement while making the record.
“It was the most enjoyable record I’ve ever been a part of,” Caleb said, with drummer Nathan Followill adding: “It’s like we allowed ourselves to be musically vulnerable.”
The post Watch Kings Of Leon headline first ever State Fayre Festival: “It feels like coming home” appeared first on NME.

title: Beyond the League: Why Lucknow Leopards' Investment in Team India Could Reshape Indian Pickleball
description: The Lucknow Leopards are pioneering a transformative approach in Indian pickleball by sponsoring the national team for the upcoming World Cup and establishing the Lucknow Leopards Championship. This initiative aims to develop the sport's ecosystem, providing a pathway for aspiring players from domestic competitions to professional leagues.
content: Professional sports franchises are usually judged by the trophies they win. Their investment begins with the auction table and often ends with the final whistle of the season. Indian pickleball may be heading in a different direction. With the Lucknow Leopards becoming the first Indian Pickleball League franchise to sponsor India's national team for the upcoming Pickleball World Cup while also launching the Lucknow Leopards Championship as part of the Road to IPBL programme, the franchise has chosen to invest beyond its own team. It is backing not just professional competition, but the ecosystem that develops India's future internationals. For a sport still building its identity, that decision could prove just as significant as winning the league itself. A Franchise Looking Beyond Its Own ColoursThe Lucknow Leopards Championship is not merely another domestic tournament. Scheduled for August 22 and 23 at Bennett University, the PWR 700 event carries a Rs 10 lakh prize purse, offers some of the highest national ranking points available in India and forms part of the Road to IPBL, through which standout performers can enter the player auction for the league's second season. Combined with the franchise's decision to sponsor the Indian team at the Pickleball World Cup, the move connects multiple stages of a player's journey that have traditionally existed in isolation. Lucknow Leopards owner Shreya Agarwal believes franchise owners now have a larger responsibility. "Pickleball is growing at an extraordinary pace in India and it is time for franchise owners to step up and invest in the sport, not just in the league, but in the Indian team." "Sponsoring our national side for the World Cup is a proud moment for the Lucknow Leopards and a statement of our belief in Indian pickleball on the global stage." For Agarwal, the championship completes that vision. "The Lucknow Leopards Championship is the other side of that coin. We want to build a world-class event that gives the best Indian players a platform to shine and a genuine pathway to the IPBL." A Bigger Talent Pool For India Veteran Indian player Dhiren Patel believes initiatives like these can fundamentally strengthen the national programme. "Through tournaments like these, India will be able to identify its true stars and the players who are genuinely dedicated to pickleball. There is a lot of talent in the country, and I think this is a great initiative," Patel told Pickleball Now. He believes a stronger professional structure naturally produces a stronger national team. "Leagues like the IPBL can showcase more stars from India. That gives us a larger pool of quality players to choose from when selecting the Indian national team." Patel also feels franchise involvement should not be limited to the league season. "If India wants to shine on the world stage, Indian pickleball players need that kind of support. If franchises continue investing in players throughout the year, it would be a great step for the sport." That philosophy reflects a broader shift taking place within Indian pickleball, where the conversation is moving from individual tournaments to year-round athlete development. From Weekend Competition to Professional CareersThe arrival of the IPBL has already changed how many players view the sport. According to Patel, pickleball is no longer considered simply another recreational activity. "The way the sport has grown in India, many tennis players are now looking at pickleball as a serious career option. At the same time, existing pickleball players are facing stronger competition because tennis players are entering the sport. He believes that change extends beyond athletes."Pickleball is now being seen as a genuine career by both players and parents. Parents understand its value because scholarships have already started in the United States, and I believe similar opportunities will eventually come to India." Support is also beginning to arrive from institutions that once viewed the sport differently. "We're also seeing schools become more supportive. If a player is representing India at the World Cup or another international tournament, schools are beginning to recognise that and give them the support they need. That shows pickleball is now being viewed as a valuable and career-making sport."The IPBL Effect Is Already Visible The inaugural Indian Pickleball League demonstrated what happens when Indian players are exposed to world-class competition. Kerala Pickleball Association secretary and Bengaluru Blasters chief strategy officer Visakh V.S., who observed the league from within a franchise, believes its impact has already extended beyond India. "I have watched the IPBL from very close quarters, and I can say one thing for sure. IPBL has taken Indian pickleball to the global stage." Calling it the country's biggest pickleball event so far, he added, "I think IPBL is the premier pickleball event in the country. I can proudly say this not just in India, but across the world."For Visakh, the biggest gain was not simply hosting international stars but allowing Indian players to compete alongside them. "We had the top two Asian players and leading global players competing in the league. It was an amazing opportunity for Indian players to rub shoulders with international powerhouses." He believes those experiences will continue to shape Indian performances long after the league season ends. "With the experience Indian players have received, I am sure they will have a psychological advantage when they compete on the international stage in future competitions." Watching the inaugural season convinced him that Indian pickleball is ready for bigger ambitions. "Watching the league closely showed how prepared Indian pickleball is to operate at a global standard." More Than a LeagueThe significance of the Lucknow Leopards' announcement lies in what it represents rather than what it spends The sponsorship of the Indian team alone will not guarantee medals. The Lucknow Leopards Championship alone will not produce dozens of professionals overnight.Together, however, they create something Indian pickleball has rarely possessed: continuity. A promising junior can now see a pathway from domestic tournaments to national rankings, from the Road to IPBL to a professional franchise, and ultimately to the Indian team.Asked whether the IPBL could eventually do for pickleball what the IPL did for Indian cricket, Patel did not hesitate. "Absolutely. Just like the IPL transformed Indian cricket, I believe the IPBL can produce stronger players and discover more talent from every corner of India. It has the potential to significantly strengthen Indian pickleball."If more franchises begin investing beyond their own squads and into tournaments, player development and the national programme, the success of Indian pickleball may no longer depend on isolated events Instead, it could be built on an ecosystem where every stage of a player's journey is connected, and where franchise ambition ultimately strengthens the country's ambitions as well.

Bharat Taxi ସହ ଯୋଡ଼ିଛନ୍ତି ୭ ଲକ୍ଷରୁ ଅଧିକ ସାରଥୀ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହ ଏବଂ ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ଶନିବାର ଗୁଜରାଟରେ ଗାନ୍ଧୀନଗରସ୍ଥିତ ମହାତ୍ମା ମନ୍ଦିର ସମ୍ମିଳନୀ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନୀ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ସମବାୟ ଭିତ୍ତିକ ଗତିଶୀଳ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ 'ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି’ର ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ନାଗରିକମାନଙ୍କୁ ଭରସାଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ସେବା ଭିତ୍ତିକ ପରିବହନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା, ଯାହା ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି, ଅଟୋ ଏବଂ ଦୁଇ ଚକିଆ ପରିବହନ ସେବାକୁ ମାଲିକାନା, ସମ୍ମାନ, ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏବଂ ସମୃଦ୍ଧି ସହିତ ଯୋଡ଼ିଥାଏ। ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ ଗୁଜରାଟର ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଭୂପେନ୍ଦ୍ରଭାଇ ପଟେଲ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ଉପମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ହର୍ଷ ସଂଘବୀ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ  ଜୀତୁଭାଇ ବାଘାନୀ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ସମବାୟ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ରମେଶଭାଇ କଟାରା, ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟର ସଚିବ ଡ. ଆଶିଷ କୁମାର ଭୁଟାନୀ, ଗୁଜରାଟର ମୁଖ୍ୟ ସଚିବ ମନୋଜ ଦାସ, ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଡ. ଜୟେନ ମେହେଟ୍ଟାଙ୍କ ସମେତ ସମବାୟ କ୍ଷେତ୍ରର ବରିଷ୍ଠ ପ୍ରତିନିଧି, ଅଧିକାରୀ ଏବଂ ବହୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟକ ସାରଥି ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଉଦବୋଧନ ଦେଇ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ସମବାୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ଆଜି ଭାରତର ଗମନାଗମନ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ପାଇଁ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଦିନ। ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଦେଶର ବିକାଶ ସହିତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି ଏବଂ ପରିବହନ ସେବାର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ଘରେ ଘରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି ଏବଂ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ଧାରଣା କେବଳ ଚାରି ଚକିଆ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସୀମିତ ନାହିଁ, ବରଂ ଦୁଇ ଚକିଆ, ଅଟୋ ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ସହରାଞ୍ଚଳ ପରିବହନ ସେବା ମଧ୍ୟ ଏହାର ଏକ ଅଂଶବିଶେଷ ହୋଇପାରିଛି। ଗୁଜୁରାଟରେ 'ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି' ର ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ ସମବାୟ ସମିତି ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଏହି ବ୍ୟାପକ ଗତିଶୀଳତାର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତାକୁ ଏକ ନୂତନ ଦିଗ ଦେବା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ।
Amit Shah: ଜୁଲାଇ ୪ରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଆସିବେ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ
ଶ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଅନ୍ୟ କମ୍ପାନୀମାନେ ଚାଳକମାନଙ୍କୁ ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଭାବେ ବିବେଚନା କରନ୍ତି, କିନ୍ତୁ ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ 'ସାରଥି ’ ଭାବେ ବିବେଚନା କରିଥାଏ। ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଏହା କେବଳ ଶବ୍ଦର ପାର୍ଥକ୍ୟ ନୁହେଁ, ବରଂ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରାର ପାର୍ଥକ୍ୟ। 'ସାରଥି' ମାନେ କେବଳ ସେବା ପ୍ରଦାନକାରୀ ନୁହନ୍ତି, ବରଂ ଏହି ସମବାୟର ସମ୍ମାନିତ ଅଂଶୀଦାର ଏବଂ 'ମାଲିକ' ଅଟନ୍ତି। ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ମୂଳ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ଉଭୟ ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଏବଂ ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କ ଶୋଷଣକୁ ରୋକିବା, ସେବାର ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବା ଏବଂ ଗତିଶୀଳତା କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ଏକ ନ୍ୟାୟସଙ୍ଗତ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିବା।
କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ବିଗତ ବର୍ଷଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ ଆପ୍ ଆଧାରିତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସି ସେବାକୁ ନେଇ ଅନେକ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଆସିଛି, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ଡ୍ରାଇଭରମାନଙ୍କ ରୋଜଗାରରୁ କିଛି ଅଧିକ କମିଶନ ନିଆଯାଉଛି, କିଛି ଦେୟ ଠିକ୍ ସମୟରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ପାରୁନାହିଁ, ଏବଂ କିଛି ପଞ୍ଜୀକରଣ ବିନା ଶୁଣାଣିରେ ବନ୍ଦ କରିଦିଆଯାଇଛି। ସେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ସମସ୍ୟାର ସମାଧାନ କେବଳ ଆଇନ ଦ୍ୱାରା ନୁହେଁ, ବେଳେବେଳେ ସଠିକ୍ ସଂସ୍ଥାଗତ ମଡେଲ ଏକ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ସମାଧାନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଥାଏ। ଏହି ଚିନ୍ତାଧାରା ସହିତ, ଭାରତ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସିର ପରିକଳ୍ପନା ଏକ ସମବାୟ ମଡେଲରେ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।

Lock Upp Sach Ya Sazaa: Govinda's Wife Sunita Ahuja - Wouldn't Want Anybody To Speak Against My Husband | EXCL
description: In an exclusive interview with Zoom, Sunita Ahuja, the wife of Govinda, opened up about doing Lock Upp: Sach Ya Sazaa. The star wife said that she wouldn't speak against her family on the Netflix show.
content: Sunita Ahuja, the wife of Bollywood actor Govinda, recently featured in Maa Hai Na, hosted by Shilpa Shetty. After doing that show with her daughter, Tina Ahuja, Sunita has taken up a new challenge with her participation in Lock Upp: Sach Ya Sazaa. It premiered today (June 27) on Netflix. Before entering Lock Upp, the star wife exclusively interacted with Zoom and discussed what she wouldn't fake for the cameras. Sunita also revealed whether she will remain her true self or be subtle on the Riteish Deshmukh and Farah Khan-hosted show.Excerpts from Sunita Ahuja's interview:Q1 - People have seen you unfiltered in interviews. Will Lock Upp: Sach Ya Sazaa be the place where people will continue to see that or do you plan to be subtle on the show?Answer: I can never change myself. I am what I am wherever I go. In Lock Upp also, people will see me the way I am.                Q2 - You're known for speaking your mind. Are you worried that your honesty could become your biggest strength or your biggest problem in the competition?Answer: Agar sach bolna galat baat hai, toh main galat baat maanne ko taiyaar hu. But main kabhi jhooth nahi bolungi. I always speak the truth and that is my strength.(Loose translation: If telling the truth is wrong, then I am ready to be wrong. But I will never lie.)Q3 - Who do you think is going to be your toughest competitor on the show?Answer: Let's see! I will try my best and give my best because I've never done reality shows. I don't know. Once when I go inside and meet the people, then I will come to know who is my competitor.Q4 - If the makers had given you the chance to bring someone to join you on this journey, who would you have picked?Answer: I will decide the person who is like me – honest and sach bolne wale (one who speaks the truth). I will pick that person.Q5 - What's one thing you're absolutely not willing to fake for the cameras, no matter what the show demands?Answer: I will not say anything against my family for camera. Family ka bohot tamasha hogaya. But it’s Lock Upp show, not a family show. I wouldn't want anybody to speak about my husband and my kids. Jo khel khelna hai khelo but family ke bal bute pe na khelo. I have a happy family. Jo bhi hai accha time aata hai, bura time aata hai, uske baad phir accha time aata hai.                (Loose translation: I will not say anything against my family for the camera. There's been a huge scene involving the family. But it’s Lock Upp show, not a family show. I wouldn’t want anybody to speak about my husband and my kids. Play whatever game you want but don’t play it at the cost of your family. I have a happy family. Whatever it is, good times come, bad times come, after that good times come again.)When and where to watch Lock Upp: Sach Ya Sazaa?Meanwhile, Lock Upp: Sach Ya Sazaa will be available for streaming from Wednesday to Saturday at 8pm on Netflix. Apart from Sunita Ahuja, the reality show's contestants list includes Shivangi Joshi, Dheeraj Dhoopar, Ram Kapoor, Pamala Serena, and others.

title: Aaj Ka Rashifal 28 June 2026: रविवार को इन राशियों को मिलेगा भाग्य का साथ, जानें मेष से मीन तक का भविष्यफल
description: Aaj Ka Rashifal 28 June 2026: जानिए कैसा रहेगा आपका रविवार का दिन। किसे मिलेगा आकस्मिक धन और कमोडिटी बाजार में किस समय व्यापार करने से होगा महालाभ, पढ़ें सटीक भविष्यफल।
content:
Aaj Ka Rashifal 28 June 2026: वैदिक ज्योतिष शास्त्र के सिद्धांतों के अनुसार, ग्रहों की बदलती चाल और नक्षत्रों का गोचर हमारे दैनिक जीवन को प्रत्यक्ष और अप्रत्यक्ष रूप से प्रभावित करता है।
आज रविवार, 28 जून 2026 का दिन कई राशि के जातकों के लिए नई उम्मीदें, बड़े अवसर और महत्वपूर्ण बदलाव लेकर आया है। आज शुद्ध ज्येष्ठ मास के शुक्ल पक्ष की चतुर्दशी तिथि है, और आज आकाश मंडल में ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र का प्रभाव रहने वाला है।
ग्रहों की यह विशेष स्थिति कुछ राशियों के लिए जहाँ आकस्मिक धन लाभ, मान-सम्मान और सोचे हुए कार्यों में सफलता लेकर आ रही है, वहीं कुछ राशियों को जल्दबाजी में निर्णय लेने और शत्रुओं के द्वेष से बचने की आवश्यकता है। इसके साथ ही आज व्यापार जगत और कमोडिटी मार्केट में भी एक विशिष्ट समय अवधि के दौरान अद्भुत लाभ की स्थिति बनेगी। आइए विस्तार से जानते हैं आज का संपूर्ण राशिफल और व्यापारिक भविष्य।
मेष राशि (Aries)-रचनात्मक कार्यों में सफलता
मेष राशि के जातकों को आज अपने कार्यक्षेत्र में बेहद सजग और सचेत रहने की आवश्यकता है। आज दफ्तर या व्यापार स्थल पर बन रहे नए समीकरणों की अनदेखी करने से आप अपने सहयोगियों के बीच अकेले पड़ सकते हैं, इसलिए टीमवर्क पर ध्यान दें।
बौद्धिक और कलात्मक क्षेत्र से जुड़े लोगों के लिए आज का दिन शानदार रहेगा। आज आपको लेखन, सृजन एवं अन्य रचनात्मक कार्यों में बेहतरीन सफलता प्राप्त होगी। पूरे दिन आपका आत्मविश्वास मजबूत बना रहेगा, जिससे आपके कई महत्वपूर्ण और लाभकारी कार्य आसानी से बनते चले जाएंगे।
वृषभ राशि (Taurus)-बड़ी सामाजिक जिम्मेदारी
वृषभ राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन सामाजिक और व्यावहारिक मोर्चे पर तरक्की लेकर आया है। आज सामाजिक जीवन में आपके प्रभाव को देखते हुए आपको कोई बहुत बड़ी और महत्वपूर्ण जिम्मेदारी सौंपी जा सकती है, जिससे आपका सम्मान बढ़ेगा।
आपके लिए आज की सबसे बड़ी सलाह यह है कि किसी भी काम को करने से पहले एक ठोस योजना बना लें और योजना बनाकर ही कार्य करें। आज आपके मन में लंबे समय से बना हुआ अज्ञात भय और चिंता पूरी तरह से दूर हो जाएगी, जिससे सोचे हुए कार्य सफलतापूर्वक समय पर पूरे होंगे।
मिथुन राशि (Gemini)-व्यापार में बड़ी सफलता
मिथुन राशि के जातकों को आज आर्थिक मामलों में अपनी आदतों पर थोड़ा नियंत्रण रखने की आवश्यकता है। आज भूलकर भी जल्दबाजी में आकर धन खर्च करने की कोई बड़ी योजना या निवेश न बनाएं, अन्यथा आपको बड़ी वित्तीय परेशानी का सामना करना पड़ सकता है।
व्यापार और व्यवसाय के मोर्चे पर आज का दिन अत्यंत भाग्यशाली रहने वाला है; आपको अपने बिजनेस में कोई बड़ी सफलता मिलेगी। इसके साथ ही आज आपका पारिवारिक जीवन पूरी तरह से आनंदमय और खुशहाल बना रहेगा, जिससे मन में संतोष की भावना रहेगी।
कर्क राशि (Cancer)-कीमती सामानों की सुरक्षा और धार्मिक आस्था
कर्क राशि के जातकों को आज व्यावहारिक और व्यक्तिगत जीवन में थोड़ी सावधानी बरतनी होगी। आज यात्रा के दौरान या घर से बाहर निकलते समय अपने कीमती सामान और महत्वपूर्ण दस्तावेजों को बहुत संभाल कर रखें, क्योंकि इनके खोने या चोरी होने की आशंका है।
आज आपकी धर्म-कर्म और आध्यात्मिक गतिविधियों में आस्था काफी ज्यादा बढ़ेगी, जिससे आप मानसिक शांति का अनुभव करेंगे। स्वास्थ्य के प्रति आज थोड़ी सतर्कता रखना आपके लिए बेहद वांछनीय और जरूरी है। सामाजिक मोर्चे पर आज आपकी लोकप्रियता में अच्छी वृद्धि देखने को मिलेगी।
सिंह राशि (Leo)-भाग्य और कर्म का अद्भुत संगम
सिंह राशि के जातकों के लिए रविवार का दिन प्रगति और पुरस्कार लेकर आया है। आज बदलते समय के रुख को पहचानते हुए यदि आप अपनी पुरानी योजनाओं में उचित बदलाव करेंगे, तो यह आपके लिए अत्यधिक लाभकारी और धन प्रदायक सिद्ध होगा।
आज आपकी धार्मिक कार्यों के प्रति रुचि काफी बढ़ी हुई रहेगी। ग्रहों के शुभ गोचर के कारण आज भाग्य एवं कर्म दोनों आपका भरपूर साथ देंगे, जिससे आपके सभी रुके काम पूरे होंगे। कार्यक्षेत्र या समाज में आज आपको किसी उत्कृष्ट कार्य के लिए पुरस्कार की प्राप्ति होने के प्रबल योग हैं।
कन्या राशि (Virgo)-सामूहिक कार्यों में सफलता
कन्या राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन समाज और संगठन में अपनी स्थिति को मजबूत करने का है। आज सामूहिक कार्यों में सबको साथ लेकर चलने का आपका प्रयास पूरी तरह से सार्थक होगा, जिससे आपकी नेतृत्व क्षमता की सराहना की जाएगी।
आपके लिए आज की विशेष सलाह यह है कि भूलकर भी दूसरों के निजी मामलों या विवादों में दखल न दें। यदि आप आज कोई खरीदी-बिक्री (क्रय-विक्रय) का कार्य करने जा रहे हैं, तो उसमें पूरी सावधानी और दस्तावेज की जांच अवश्य रखें। समाज में आज आपको उत्तम मान-सम्मान की प्राप्ति होगी।
तुला राशि (Libra)-आकस्मिक धन लाभ के योग
तुला राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन थोड़ा मिश्रित प्रभाव लेकर आएगा। मानसिक स्तर पर आज आप लोगों की अत्यधिक भीड़भाड़ वाले स्थानों में खुद को थोड़ा असहज और थका हुआ महसूस करेंगे, इसलिए एकांत में समय बिताना आपके लिए अच्छा रहेगा।
आर्थिक दृष्टिकोण से आज का दिन बेहद शानदार रहने वाला है। आज आपको कहीं से अचानक आकस्मिक धन की प्राप्ति हो सकती है। आज भविष्य की कुछ लाभदायक योजनाओं पर करीबियों के साथ विचार-विमर्श होगा। हालांकि, अपने प्रयासों को सफल बनाने के लिए काम में सावधानी रखना वांछनीय है।
वृश्चिक राशि (Scorpio)-नए कारोबारी सौदे
वृश्चिक राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन व्यावसायिक उन्नति लेकर आया है। व्यापार के क्षेत्र में आज आपके कुछ नए और महत्वपूर्ण कारोबारी सौदे तय हो सकते हैं, जो आपके बिजनेस को आगे बढ़ाने में बेहद सहायक सिद्ध होंगे। कार्यस्थल पर आपके काम की जमकर प्रशंसा होगी।
आज आपके भीतर साहसिक क्षमता और जोखिम उठाने की प्रवृत्ति में अच्छी वृद्धि देखने को मिलेगी। हालांकि, आपको दफ्तर में थोड़ा संभलकर रहना होगा; कार्यक्षेत्र के उच्चाधिकारियों का आपके प्रति आंतरिक रूप से द्वेष और ईर्ष्या का भाव रह सकता है, इसलिए अपने काम से काम रखें।
धनु राशि (Sagittarius)-मांगलिक कार्यों में सफलता
धनु राशि के जातकों के लिए रविवार का दिन पारिवारिक खुशियाँ और मांगलिक अवसर लेकर आया है। जो लोग लंबे समय से विवाह योग्य हैं, उनके लिए आज शादी-विवाह की चर्चाओं में बड़ी सफलता मिलने के पूरे आसार दिखाई दे रहे हैं, जिससे घर में खुशी का माहौल रहेगा।
आज आपके द्वारा किए गए लगातार प्रयासों से कठिन कार्यों में भी अच्छी सफलता मिलेगी और आपके सभी निजी कार्यों की समय पर पूर्ति होगी। स्वास्थ्य के मोर्चे पर आज आपको थोड़ा सावधान रहने की जरूरत है; आज उदर विकार (पेट से संबंधित समस्याओं) आदि के कारण कुछ कष्ट हो सकता है।
मकर राशि (Capricorn)-सहज व्यवहार से विरोधियों पर विजय
मकर राशि के जातकों के लिए आज का दिन अपने आत्मविश्वास को दिखाने का है। आज आप अपने करियर और व्यापार में सफलता प्राप्त करने के लिए किसी भी प्रकार का बड़ा जोखिम उठाने के लिए पूरी तरह तैयार रहेंगे, और यह साहस आपको लाभ देगा।
आज आपके सहज, सरल और मधुर व्यवहार से आपके घोर विरोधी और शत्रु भी पूरी तरह प्रभावित हो जाएंगे और उनके विरोध की गति धीमी पड़ जाएगी। मानसिक रूप से आज आप पूरी तरह प्रसन्न और तनावमुक्त रहेंगे। समय की अनुकूलता के कारण आपके सभी सोचे हुए काम वक्त पर पूरे हो जाएंगे।
कुंभ राशि (Aquarius)-योजनाओं का फलीभूत होना
कुंभ राशि के जातकों को आज जल्दबाजी की आदत से पूरी तरह बचना होगा। आज दफ्तर या व्यापार में किसी भी काम को बहुत जल्द निपटाने के चक्कर में आप अपना कोई बड़ा आर्थिक या व्यावहारिक नुकसान कर बैठेंगे, इसलिए धैर्य से काम लें।
राहत की बात यह है कि आपकी पुरानी बनाई गई कोई महत्वपूर्ण योजना आज पूरी तरह फलीभूत होगी। समय की अनुकूलता से आज सोचे हुए कार्यों में अच्छी गति आएगी, जिससे रुका हुआ धन भी वापस मिल सकता है। आज पूरे दिन कामकाज में आपकी व्यस्तता काफी ज्यादा बढ़ी रहेगी।
मीन राशि (Pisces)-राजकीय मामलों में बड़ी विजय
मीन राशि के जातकों के लिए रविवार का दिन कानूनी और सरकारी मोर्चे पर बड़ी राहत लेकर आया है। काफी समय से अदालतों या सरकारी दफ्तरों में अटके हुए आपके राजकीय मामले आज बहुत ही आसानी से सुलझ जाएंगे, जिससे आपका मानसिक बोझ पूरी तरह हल्का होगा।
आज आप परिवार के साथ किसी बड़े धार्मिक कार्य या यात्रा में शामिल हो सकते हैं, जिससे मन शांत रहेगा। कार्यक्षेत्र में आज आपको अपने अधीनस्थ लोगों (Subordinates) और कर्मचारियों से पूरी अनुकूलता और सहयोग प्राप्त होगा। पूरे दिन आपका आत्मविश्वास और ऊर्जा का स्तर बहुत ऊंचा बना रहेगा।
व्यापार-भविष्य: आज का बाजार विश्लेषण और कमोडिटी ट्रेंड
आज शुद्ध ज्येष्ठ शुक्ल चतुर्दशी तिथि है और इस विशेष दिन पर आकाश मंडल में ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र का प्रभाव रहने वाला है। ज्योतिषीय गणना और ग्रहों के गोचर के अनुसार, ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र के इस विशिष्ट प्रभाव के कारण आज कमोडिटी बाजार, खाद्यान्न बाजार, वस्त्र उद्योग और सराफा बाजार में एक विशेष गिरावट (मंदी) का रुख देखने को मिलेगा।
व्यापारी वर्ग, स्टॉकिस्टों और निवेशकों के लिए आज का बाजार विश्लेषण और ग्रहों की समय अवधि के संकेत भविष्य की रणनीति बनाने के लिए अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण हैं। आइए विस्तार से जानते हैं आज की व्यावसायिक भविष्यवाणियां:
सराफा और वस्त्र बाजार में मंदी (Bullion & Textile Market Trends)
ज्येष्ठा नक्षत्र के प्रभाव के चलते आज सराफा बाजार के निवेशकों और वस्त्र उद्योग से जुड़े व्यापारियों के लिए बाजार थोड़ा सुस्त रहने का संकेत दे रहा है। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार, आज सोने और चांदी के भाव में मंदी की चाल चलेगी। इसके साथ ही उनी वस्त्र, रूई और सूत (Yarn) के बाजार में भी आज कीमतों में गिरावट दर्ज की जा सकती है। जो लोग इन वस्तुओं की नई खरीदारी या लिवाली करना चाहते हैं, उनके लिए यह मंदी एक अच्छा अवसर साबित हो सकती है।
किराना और खाद्यान्न बाजार (Grocery Market Analysis)
अनाज और किराना बाजार की बात करें तो आज मीठे के बाजार में भी मंदी का स्पष्ट असर देखने को मिलेगा। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार, आज गुड़ और खांड (चीनी) के भाव में मंदी का रुख बना रहेगा, जिससे थोक बाजारों में कीमतों में कुछ कमी आ सकती है। स्टॉकिस्टों को आज बाजार की चाल को देखकर ही माल का उठाव करना चाहिए।
आज व्यापार करने का विशेष महामुहूर्त
आज ग्रहों की स्थिति व्यापारियों के लिए एक बहुत ही विशेष वित्तीय लाभ का योग बना रही है। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार, आज दोपहर 2 बजकर 12 मिनट से लेकर 2 बजकर 15 मिनट के रुख पर व्यापार करना अत्यंत लाभप्रद रहेगा। इस मात्र 3 मिनट की विशेष समय अवधि और इसके बाद बनने वाले बाजार के रुख को समझकर यदि कोई बड़ा सौदा या निवेश किया जाए, तो उसमें भारी मुनाफा मिलने की शत-प्रतिशत संभावना रहेगी।
ये भी पढ़ें :-   Aaj Ka Rashifal 27 June 2026: शनिवार को चमकेगी इन राशियों की किस्मत, जानें किन बातों का रखना होगा ध्यान
आज का विशेष भाग्यांक
आज के दिन सभी प्रकार के नए व्यापारिक समझौतों, बड़े वित्तीय सौदों, कमोडिटी मार्केट में निवेश या किसी भी महत्वपूर्ण कार्य की शुरुआत करते समय शुभ अंकों का विशेष ध्यान रखें। ज्योतिषीय गणना के अनुसार भाग्यांक 5406 आज आपके लिए अत्यंत शुभ, फलदायी और आर्थिक समृद्धि दिलाने वाला साबित होगा। इस अंक के प्रभाव से आपके व्यावसायिक निर्णयों में सटीकता आएगी।

title: How Russell's quick thinking produced unexpected pole

Nancy Guthrie Latest Update: Who is Greg Kerr? Man Claims He Knows Where Savannah Guthrie's Mother Is
description: Authorities are investigating a recent ransom-related communication linked to her kidnapping, which reportedly contains information about a video and identifies suspects.
content: A man has publicly claimed he knows the whereabouts of Nancy Guthrie, the missing mother of Today show presenter Savannah Guthrie, as investigators examine another ransom-related communication in the months-long kidnapping case. Greg Kerr, who identified himself in a public message addressed to Savannah Guthrie, said he believed Nancy was still alive and urged the television presenter to contact him. His claims have not been verified by law enforcement. in a message shared publicly, Kerr wrote: "My name is Greg Kerr. In one of your videos you said if you know something find a way to contact me." He continued: "God heard your prayers and over a period of day's has shown me who took your mother and where she is being held." Kerr urged Savannah Guthrie to research him before making contact. "Before you Contact me personally, google 'GREG KERR Louisiana' so you know who you are dealing with." He concluded: "I have every reason to believe your mother is alive."It is unclear whether investigators have assessed Kerr's claims. The message emerged as another letter linked to the kidnapping was reportedly sent to media organisations. According to TMZ, the latest communication came from the same email address previously used to send ransom notes and was forwarded to the FBI. The anonymous writer claimed to have "a phone stashed in a secure location" containing a video showing what was described as "the main guy" with Nancy Guthrie on "probably her last" day. The letter also claimed to identify two people allegedly responsible for her kidnapping. Authorities have not publicly confirmed the claims contained in the letter. Nancy Guthrie, 84, disappeared from her Tucson home during the early hours of 1 February 2026. In the days following her disappearance, several ransom notes were sent to members of her family and media organisations. TMZ reported receiving one note that correctly described the clothing Nancy had been wearing on the night she vanished, as well as damage to a floodlight at her property. In June, Air Mail reported that another blackmail letter sent to Savannah Guthrie's family originated from the same IP address as previous messages. According to the report, the writer claimed Nancy had died accidentally and demanded $4m in exchange for returning her body. Investigators reportedly considered the earlier ransom communications potentially credible. Speaking in an interview with former Today co-host Hoda Kotb, Savannah Guthrie said her family believed the first two ransom notes were "real". Following the ransom demands, Savannah Guthrie and her sister released an emotional video on Instagram appealing directly to whoever was responsible. "Return our mother to us, so that we can celebrate with her… this is the only way we will have peace," they said. "This is very valuable to us, and we will pay." Nancy Guthrie was last seen after spending the evening with her daughter Annie and Annie's husband, Tommaso Cioni. Her disappearance was discovered the following morning when she failed to attend her regular church service. Investigators later determined that her doorbell camera was disconnected at 1:47am. According to investigators, the mobile application connected to Nancy's pacemaker lost contact with her phone at 2:28am, indicating she had been moved far enough away for the connection to be severed. The FBI later released doorbell camera footage showing a masked man wearing a balaclava and dark clothing approaching Nancy's front door with what appeared to be a handgun holstered at his waist.

title: Karachi Rocked by Blasts and Gunfire After Attack Near Rangers HQ, Multiple Casualties Feared
description: A suspected suicide bombing near the Sindh Rangers headquarters in Karachi led to multiple explosions and prolonged gunfire, resulting in a significant security operation.
content: Pakistan's financial hub Karachi was rocked by explosions and gunfire late on Saturday with attackers targeting Sindh Rangers headquarters, prompting a major security operation in the city. According to initial reports from Pakistan, a suicide bomber detonated explosives near the Rangers compound while other suspected attackers opened fire on security personnel, leading to an intense gun battle that reportedly lasted for nearly 30 minutes.Sources said a powerful initial explosion was followed by two smaller blasts, with heavy gunfire echoing across the area as security forces responded to the attack. Reports of around 8 fatalities so far in the suicide attack, with several others critically injured. 3 gunman has been killed along with 3 of the Pak Rangers has been killed in the encounter, Sindh Inspector General Javed Alam Odho confirmed.The incident occurred in Karachi's Gulistan i Jauhar neighbourhood on a major road that connects several universities and provides access to the Pakistan Meteorological Department.Police, Rangers and rescue teams rushed to the scene after receiving reports of explosions and gunfire. Authorities quickly cordoned off the area as security personnel launched a clearance operation to secure the neighbourhood and search for any remaining attackers.The exact cause of the explosions, the number of casualties and the identity of those behind the attack have not yet been officially confirmed.Videos circulating on social media showed a heavy deployment of police and emergency responders around the site, while intermittent gunfire could reportedly be heard during the operation.Sindh Chief Minister Syed Murad Ali Shah has sought a detailed report on the incident from security officials as investigations continue.Authorities have urged the public to avoid the area while the operation remains underway. More details are expected as officials assess the situation.

title: The end of Putin’s regime will spring from war spending chaos, former central bank advisor says, amid military mutiny threat and fuel-shortage brawls
description: "It’s less dramatic than a palace coup, but this is what decline looks like."
content:
Vladimir Putin’s grip on power has remained resilient despite the economic woes caused by his invasion of Ukraine, but the seeds of an eventual decline may have already been planted, according to a former Russian central bank advisor.



A telltale sign is the Kremlin’s abandonment of any fiscal discipline as the costs of fighting the Ukraine war, which is now in its fifth year, strain existing resources. 



Alexandra Prokopenko, who is now a fellow at the Carnegie Russia Eurasia Center, pointed out in a recent Financial Times op-ed that the war has forced Russia to unwind its long-touted fiscal restraint.



In a striking example of the turnaround, Russia’s parliament recently gave the finance ministry a blank check to spend more and borrow past its debt ceiling without a formal budget or explicit legislative approval.



That’s as the budget deficit through May is already double 2025’s full-year level, hitting 2.6% of GDP, or about $83 billion. At the same time, Russia’s sovereign wealth fund, which has been tapped to cover budget shortfalls, is being rapidly depleted and just a fraction of prewar levels.



 “A cornered autocracy is rewriting the fiscal rules as it goes, cutting parliament out of the loop, and will not admit to dangers it cannot control,” Prokopenko wrote. “It’s less dramatic than a palace coup, but this is what decline looks like.”



The precipitous deterioration in Russia’s finances coincides with Ukraine’s stunning military successes this year. Advanced drones and new tactics have allowed Kyiv to not hold off the Russian military’s attacks but push them back and regain territory. Long-range drones are also reaching deep into Russia, including St. Petersburg and Moscow, targeting refineries and the defense industrial base. 



The result has been devastating battlefield casualties that now outpace the ability to raise fresh recruits as well as soaring death-benefit payouts and widespread fuel shortages across the country. 



Meanwhile, the Kremlin has been unable to defend against all of Ukraine’s drone attacks, forcing companies to spend more than $1 billion of their own money on makeshift protection. But Moscow also refuses to reimburse them. 



Putin’s “juggling act” has now come to an end as he can no longer fund his war, keep a lid on inflation, and continue growing the economy all at once, Prokopenko said.



“The war is increasingly paid for by quietly invoicing the population and suspending the state’s own rules,” she added. “A regime sustained this way is heading for a poorer, angrier country, a financial system out of control, and war funding it cannot count on. The end, when it comes, will spring from this kind of decline, the sort that begins long before anyone names it.”



For now, Putin’s grip on power is secure, but public discontent is growing as average citizens buckle under the pressure of high inflation and onerous interest rates.



Russia’s fuel shortage has added to the misery, creating long lines at gas stations with motorists waiting for hours to fill up. Frustration is boiling over, and fights are breaking out between people struggling to buy rationed supplies of gasoline.


Black smoke rises from the refinery where a fire broke out following a strike as firefighting efforts continue in Moscow, Russia on June 18, 2026. Sefa Karacan/Anadolu via Getty Images



In addition, the Russian military’s “meat-grinder” tactics in Ukraine, where troops suffer ruinous losses for barely any gain, are creating a backlash. 



In fact, the average life expectancy of a new recruit is about 10 days to three weeks, and once on the battlefield, their survival averages just 20-35 minutes, according to Russian military bloggers. 



One Russian blogger, who is a veteran the Ukraine war going by the name Aleksandr Lunin, posted a video on Thursday that went viral. In it, he described regular torture of soldiers by their own commanders, according to Radio Free Europe.



Lunin also demanded a live, on-air meeting with Putin and warned that if it did not take place soon, “the army will turn its weapons against the Kremlin.” He added that he was relaying the sentiment of active-duty military and security officials who met with him earlier. 



But he walked back the mutiny threat on Friday, explaining that if soldiers wanted to rebel, they would do it quietly and not ask him to issue a warning for them



Still, the original video was so widespread that Putin’s spokesman was asked to comment on it, and said the Kremlin was aware “that such an appeal exists.”



Peter Frankopan, a professor of global history at the University of Oxford, cautioned in a Foreign Policy article that a revolution in Russia is not likely.



Instead, continued economic pain and disenchantment over the war will convince certain factions in the regime “that it is time for a new start,” he said, adding that “today’s cracks can become tomorrow’s fissures.”



But that could also make Putin more dangerous as fights to cling to power, raising the risk of escalation in Ukraine or other parts of Europe.



“Beware the drowning man: The coming months will likely be dangerous outside and inside Russia as Putin tries desperately to stay afloat,” Frankopan warned.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: BBC Seeks Trump's Phone Records, Calendar and Diaries in Explosive Jan 6 Capitol Riot Court Fight
description: The BBC has sought access to Donald Trump's phone records and schedules from the time surrounding the January 6 Capitol attack, as part of a defamation lawsuit filed by Trump.
content: The BBC has requested access to US President Donald Trump’s phone records and private schedules from around the time of the January 6, 2021, US Capitol attack as part of an ongoing defamation lawsuit filed by Trump against the British broadcaster, according to The Telegraph.Trump's legal battle stems from a BBC report that allegedly linked him to efforts surrounding the Capitol riot, which the president claims was defamatory and damaged his reputation. As part of its defense, the BBC is now seeking records that could shed light on Trump's communications, movements, and activities during the period leading up to and immediately following the January 6 attack.According to The Telegraph, the broadcaster has asked the court to compel Trump to produce phone logs, call records, diaries, calendars, and other scheduling documents that could help establish the factual basis of its reporting. The BBC argues that the requested materials are relevant to determining whether its coverage was substantially true or protected under defamation law.The BBC has requested that U.S. President Donald Trump hand over his phone records and private schedules from around the time of the January 6, 2021, attack on the U.S. Capitol as part of Trump’s defamation lawsuit against the corporation, according to The Telegraph. pic.twitter.com/nVyIgy4nkZ— AZ Intel (@AZ_Intel_) June 27, 2026 The request is expected to face resistance from Trump's legal team, which may argue that the records are overly broad, irrelevant, or protected by executive privilege and privacy concerns. The court will ultimately decide whether Trump must comply with the discovery request.The development marks the latest twist in a high-profile legal battle between Trump and one of the world's largest public broadcasters. Discovery disputes over access to documents and communications often play a critical role in defamation cases, particularly when the reporting concerns matters of significant public interest.If the court grants the BBC's request, Trump's communications and schedule surrounding one of the most scrutinized days in modern American political history could become a key piece of evidence in the case. The outcome of the discovery fight may also shape the broader trajectory of the lawsuit as it moves toward trial.
